attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.REFRESH_DATETIME, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.PARTNER_PO_ID, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.PARTNER_ID, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.PARTNER_NAME, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '), CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.PO_LINE_NUM, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.EAC_COST, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.CREATED_BY, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.CREATION_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.START_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.END_DATE, CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO.PO_TYPE 
FROM
 $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO 
WHERE
 SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO)
attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_CSTFRST_PT_PN_PO)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.PARTNER_PO_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.PARTNER_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.PARTNER_NAME,  STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.PO_LINE_NUM, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.EAC_COST, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.PO_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT,
 (
 select PARTNER_PO_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT
 minus
 select PARTNER_PO_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT_PN_P
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PARTNER_PO_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.PARTNER_PO_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PR_CST_FRST_PRT.REFRESH_DATETIME
